# PhD Applications

This directory contains application materials for various PhD positions.

## Structure

Each subdirectory represents a separate PhD application with all related materials:

### ntu-edge-ai-2026/
PhD position in Edge AI Systems at Nanyang Technological University (NTU), Singapore
- **Position:** Edge AI Systems Research
- **Advisors:** Dr. Rui Tan & Dr. Arvind Easwaran
- **Deadline:** April 30, 2026
- **Status:** In Progress

**Contents:**
- `CV_Research_Musthofa_Joko_Anggoro.pdf` - Research-focused CV (2 pages, LaTeX)
- `CV_Research_Musthofa_Joko_Anggoro.tex` - LaTeX source file
- `Email_Draft_NTU_PhD.md` - Application email draft
- `PhD_Application_Summary.md` - Comprehensive application guide with checklist

## Usage

Each application folder contains:
1. Tailored CV/resume (PDF and source)
2. Email/cover letter drafts
3. Summary/checklist document
4. Any supplementary materials

## Notes

Keep this directory organized by creating a new subfolder for each application with a descriptive name format: `[university-abbreviation]-[position-topic]-[year]`
